/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -DLOCAL_MODE -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libinf-worker.so -o libinf-worker.so CMakeFiles/inf-worker.dir/query_client.cc.o CMakeFiles/inf-worker.dir/model_executor.cc.o CMakeFiles/inf-worker.dir/process_executor.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kwadwo/Desktop/WORK/PROGRAMMING_WORLD/PROJECTS_RESEARCH/Templates/DIFS/build/src/metadata-store:/usr/local/lib ../metadata-store/libredis-md.so ../../protos/internal/libinfaas-protos-internal.a -lgrpc++_unsecure -lgrpc -lgpr /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.so /usr/local/lib/libabsl_synchronization.so.2206.0.0 -lredox /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libev.so -lgrpc++ -lgrpc /usr/local/lib/libabsl_graphcycles_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_time.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_civil_time.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_time_zone.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_stacktrace.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_symbolize.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_strings.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_strings_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_int128.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_throw_delegate.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_malloc_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_debugging_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_demangle_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_base.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_log_severity.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.2206.0.0
